variants.title: WP650
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WP650. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WP650 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 128.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.0 mm, Length: 126.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN

variants.title: WP650
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P786440 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the Filtrec WP650
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 128.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.0 mm, Length: 126.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN
